title: In Walked Mary
writer: Oliver D. Bailey, George DuBois Proctor
actors: June Caprice, Thomas Carrigan, Stanley Walpole
plot: Dick Allison comes to the aid of Mary Ann Hubbard, a young dispossessed woman in the South, and the two become close friends. Dick leaves the South to move to New York, and Mary soon finds herself in dire financial straits. She de...
